properties.name: connotation
properties.description: Sets the color of the audio player

properties.name: currentTime
properties.description: Gets and sets the current time

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Sets the disabled state of the audio player

properties.name: duration
properties.description: Gets the duration (in seconds) of the audio

properties.name: paused
properties.description: Returns the paused state of the audio

properties.name: playback-rates
properties.description: Comma-separated string of numbers to define playback speeds

properties.name: skip-by
properties.description: Sets the amount of seconds to skip the audio by

properties.name: duration-fallback
properties.description: Enables fallback logic to fetch and decode audio buffer for duration when metadata is missing.

properties.name: play-button-aria-label
properties.description: Sets an accessible label for the play button

properties.name: pause-button-aria-label
properties.description: Sets an accessible label for the pause button

properties.name: slider-aria-label
properties.description: Sets an accessible label for the progress slider

properties.name: skip-forward-aria-label
properties.description: Sets an accessible label for the skip-forward button

properties.name: skip-backward-aria-label
properties.description: Sets an accessible label for the skip-backward button
